reason: The global at-most-eight sequential counter was allocated with top_id equal to the primary-variable count after point-degree counters had already allocated auxiliaries. Reused auxiliary identifiers coupled independent counters and made the CNF semantically stronger than the declared covering problem.
drat_replay: The DRAT proof correctly verifies the emitted CNF but cannot validate the incorrect source-to-CNF transformation.
corrective_action: Allocate every later cardinality encoding above the current CNF maximum variable and add explicit auxiliary-range receipts plus semantic cross-encoding controls.
